title: Exclusive eBook: How AI is becoming the next military advisor
optimized_headline: Discover How AI is Evolving into Military Advisory Roles
raw_excerpt: A collection of stories about how militaries are using AI models to make decisions. This subscriber-only eBook is a package of six stories that were originally published in MIT Technology Review between April 11, 2025, and April 21, 2026, and have been updated to reflect recent developments. Stories written by James O’Donnel by James O’Donnell…
raw_body: A collection of stories about how militaries are using AI models to make decisions. This subscriber-only eBook is a package of six stories that were originally published in MIT Technology Review between April 11, 2025, and April 21, 2026, and have been updated to reflect recent developments. Stories written by James O’Donnel by James O’Donnell…
speedrun: An exclusive eBook reveals how militaries are increasingly relying on AI models for decision-making. Compiled from six updated stories originally published in MIT Technology Review, these narratives highlight the evolving role of AI in military strategy. With advancements in AI technology, military leaders could enhance their operational effectiveness and decision speed. This shift matters now as nations race to integrate AI into defense strategies, potentially reshaping global military dynamics.
why_it_matters: Military leaders could make faster, more informed decisions, impacting troop safety and operational success.
This trend indicates a broader shift in defense strategies, as nations increasingly adopt AI to maintain competitive advantages.

lenses.eli12: The eBook discusses how AI is being used by militaries to make crucial decisions. Think of AI as a smart advisor that helps military leaders analyze complex data quickly. This matters to everyday people because it could affect national security and how conflicts are managed in our world.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, this trend highlights a growing user need for AI tools that can analyze vast amounts of data quickly. The military's adoption of AI could drive demand for more efficient decision-making solutions. A practical implication is that companies may need to adapt their products for defense applications, opening new markets.
lenses.engineer: The eBook showcases various AI models that militaries are employing for strategic decisions. These models analyze data to enhance situational awareness and operational efficiency. However, engineers should consider the ethical implications of deploying AI in military contexts, as the stakes are significantly higher than in commercial applications.
